source_metadata.title: 2025 07 24 Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 24 July 2025 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Sam Fisher: Inquiry into threats and violence against women MPs and local authority reps
Sam Fisher
Parliamentary Service
Rafael Gonzalez-Montero, Chief Executive
Bridget Wilson, Security Manager - Systems & Enablement
Dr Justin Barry-Walsh
